ext_description.message: Summarize, translate, extract, and chat about any page. Bring your own keys; works with Claude, Gemini, GPT, Grok, Groq, and Ollama.

onboarding_sub.message: Pick a provider (Claude, Gemini, Groq, etc.) and add your API key. Keys stay on your device.

hero_title.message: How can I help with this page?

hero_sub.message: Summarize, extract, translate, or ask anything. Page context is included automatically.

foot_note.message: Aside can make mistakes. Check important info.
